_meta.purpose: Canonical source of truth for all brand package files. All claims in brand materials must trace back to a field in this document.
_meta.maintainer: Update this file when the system architecture changes. Then run a search for any outdated references across the brand package.

product.status: v1.0 framework — not battle-tested at enterprise scale

technical_identity.what_it_is: A hierarchical prompt-based orchestration framework that runs inside Claude Code (Anthropic's CLI tool). It is NOT a SaaS product, NOT a hosted service, NOT a standalone application.
technical_identity.runtime_environment: Local machine, inside a Claude Code terminal session
dependencies: Claude Pro or Max subscription (required by Claude Code)
technical_identity.requires_model: Claude (Anthropic) — any model available through Claude Code

layers.name: CEO Orchestrator
layers.role: Master controller, entry point for every session. Reads state file and delegates to directors.

phases.name: Intake
phases.description: Accepts raw brain dump. Generates clarifying questions. Extracts requirements. Produces a Single Source of Truth (SSOT) document for user approval.

phases.name: Research
phases.description: Investigates implementation approaches. Analyzes pros/cons. Builds a scored decision matrix. Presents 3-5 options with recommendation.

phases.name: Architecture
phases.description: Creates technical blueprint. Maps dependencies. Analyzes complexity. Generates sprint-based implementation plan.

phases.name: Execution
phases.description: Sets up environment. Executes implementation tasks sprint by sprint across multiple chat sessions. Validates each sprint. Runs integration tests.

phases.name: Quality
phases.description: Verifies output against original vision. Runs quality checks. Generates documentation. Prepares deployment package. Final user review.

key_innovation.name: Stateless Execution, Stateful Workspace
key_innovation.problem_solved: Context window death in multi-session AI workflows
key_innovation.mechanism: JSON state machine (orchestration-state.json) serves as persistent memory. Each session reads state → executes → updates state → stops cleanly.
key_innovation.sessions: Unlimited. Each resumes from exact stopping point.

honest_limitations: Requires Claude Code (Anthropic's CLI) — not model-agnostic
Quality of output is bounded by the underlying Claude model's capabilities
Complex projects may require 15-20+ chat sessions
The system orchestrates Claude's work — it does not add capabilities Claude doesn't already have
No GUI, no web dashboard — terminal-native workflow only
Not battle-tested at enterprise scale — this is a v1.0 framework
Requires active Claude Pro or Max subscription

competitors.name: Devin (Cognition Labs)
competitors.pricing_verified: $20/month entry tier; Team plan $500/month with 250 ACUs; pay-as-you-go available

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot Workspace
competitors.type: Plan-and-execute coding agent integrated with GitHub
competitors.status: Technical preview sunset May 30, 2025; now available to paid Copilot subscribers
competitors.scope: PR-level and issue-level work, not full project generation

competitors.name: Cursor (Agent Mode)
competitors.type: IDE-integrated AI coding with agent mode

competitors.name: Replit Agent
competitors.multi_session_continuity: Partial — hosted environment persists but agent logic resets
limitations: Can break other parts of app when fixing

competitors.name: Bolt.new
competitors.cost_risk: Can cost $1,000+ for complex apps due to token burn

competitors.name: v0 (Vercel)
competitors.scope: Frontend components only — no backend, no database

competitors.name: CrewAI
competitors.type: Python-based multi-agent framework with role hierarchy

competitors.name: LangGraph
competitors.architecture: Directed graph with nodes and edges

competitors.name: Claude Code (base, without this system)
competitors.what_it_does: Terminal-based coding agent that reads codebases, writes files, runs commands
competitors.what_it_lacks: Built-in multi-session state management, hierarchical delegation, phase-gated workflow
competitors.this_system_adds: State machine persistence, CEO→Director→Worker delegation chain, structured 5-phase pipeline, phase approval gates
